parameters.query:
SELECT 
  m.id AS "memberID",
  m.created_at AS "memberCreatedAt",
  m.name AS "memberName",
  m.email,
  m.phone_number AS "memberPhoneNumber",
  m."ClickUpID" AS "memberClickUpID",
  m."sentDepartmentEmail",
  r."roleName",
  d.id AS "departmentID",
  d.created_at AS "departmentCreatedAt",
  d."departmentName",
  d.emoji,
  d."ClickUpAssignOtherListID",
  d."ClickUpFolderID",
  d."driveID",
  d.gmail,
  d.password,
  d."phoneNumber" AS "departmentPhoneNumber",
  d."backupCodes",
  d."GoogleAuthenticatorKey"
FROM public."Members" m
LEFT JOIN public."MemberDepartment" md ON m.id = md."memberID"
LEFT JOIN public."Department" d ON md."departmentID" = d.id
LEFT JOIN public."MemberRole" mr ON m.id = mr."memberID"
LEFT JOIN public."Role" r ON mr."roleID" = r.id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.id }};

parameters.subject: Accès au compte départemental / Department Account Access

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  m.id AS "memberID",
  m.created_at AS "memberCreatedAt",
  m.name AS "memberName",
  m.email,
  m.phone_number AS "memberPhoneNumber",
  m."ClickUpID" AS "memberClickUpID",
  m."sentDepartmentEmail",
  r."roleName",
  d.id AS "departmentID",
  d.created_at AS "departmentCreatedAt",
  d."departmentName",
  d.emoji,
  d."ClickUpAssignOtherListID",
  d."ClickUpFolderID",
  d."driveID",
  d.gmail,
  d.password,
  d."phoneNumber" AS "departmentPhoneNumber",
  d."backupCodes",
  d."GoogleAuthenticatorKey"
FROM public."Members" m
LEFT JOIN public."MemberDepartment" md ON m.id = md."memberID"
LEFT JOIN public."Department" d ON md."departmentID" = d.id
LEFT JOIN public."MemberRole" mr ON m.id = mr."memberID"
LEFT JOIN public."Role" r ON mr."roleID" = r.id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.id }};
